footer.tagline: Free online tools that run entirely in your browser. No uploads, no sign-up, no limits — {count} tools and counting.

toolsIndex.metaDescription: The complete A–Z directory of every free online tool on {site} — PDF, image, text, developer and calculator tools, all private and in-browser.
toolsIndex.title: All tools — A to Z
toolsIndex.lede: Every tool on {site} in one place — {count} and counting. Jump to a letter, scroll the lot, or filter instantly below.
toolsIndex.matching: {count, plural, one {# tool} other {# tools}} matching “{q}”

home.srHeading: Compress PDFs, resize images, trim videos, format JSON —
home.sub: {count} fast, free, privacy-first tools for PDFs, images, video, text, code and everyday math. Your files never leave your device — and you can prove it: open your browser's Network tab and watch nothing upload.
home.searchHint: Search {count} tools — merge PDF, resize image, word count…
home.dropHint: …or drop a file anywhere and we'll show what you can do with it.
home.assistantHead: Don't know the tool's name? Just describe it.
home.assistantBlurb: Type what you're trying to do — or drop a file — and we'll open the right tool instantly.
